title: Growth and Shrinking Potions
description: New potions that make your player grow or shrink!
body:
---
This datapack adds 2 new potions, the *Potion of Growth* and the *Potion of Shrinking*!

---
Obtain these potions in the Trial Chambers! If using an ominous vault, there is a chance to get a special potion...

---
Potions:

- Growth I (3:00 or 8:00) - Found in Trial Chambers
- Growth II (3:00 or 8:00) - Found in Trial Chambers
  

- Shrinking I (3:00 or 8:00) - Found in Trial Chambers
- Shrinking II (3:00 or 8:00) - Found in Trial Chambers
  

- Growth **X** (3:00) - Found in Ominous Vaults

---

Each level makes you bigger or smaller depending on the potion! Have fun, thank you for downloading!
